en: Chewbacca, may I speak to Tracy, please?
Paz Peters here to kill future me!
ko: 파즈 피터스가 미래의 나를 죽이러 왔어!

en: Do you have a prescription for Mr. Tracy Jordan? Thank you.
ko: 트레이시 조던 씨의 처방전이 있나요? 감사합니다.

en: Come on out of there, buddy.
Jack would like to see you up in his office.
ko: 잭이 당신을 그의 사무실에서 보고 싶어 해.

en: Oh, I don't have time for this!
Yeah, Jonathan, tell him I've got my hands full with Tracy. You sound upset. I am upset.
ko: 응, 조나단, 트레이시 때문에 바쁘다고 전해줘. 화난 것 같아. 화났어.

en: Well, come on up and we'll talk about it. Brr!
Fine, I will try the other location.
But frankly, LaDonnaka, you have not been real.
ko: 하지만 솔직히, 라돈나카, 너는 진실하지 않았어.
